# Repatriate Service

> A specialist UK-based funeral repatriation service that coordinates the return of deceased loved ones from abroad to any destination worldwide. Not a funeral home, not a travel insurer — a dedicated repatriation coordination service available 24 hours a day.

Repatriate Service provides families with expert coordination of international repatriation of deceased individuals from 26+ countries. All content is sourced from FCDO guidance, official embassy contacts, and direct professional experience. Information is reviewed and updated regularly; process and cost information is verified against current country requirements (most recently May 2026).

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://repatriationfuneral.com/): Overview of funeral repatriation services and country guide index.
- [FAQ](https://repatriationfuneral.com/faq/): Direct answers on costs, timelines, insurance, embalming, ashes, and embassy roles.
- [How We Verify Information](https://repatriationfuneral.com/methodology/): Sources, operator vetting standards, cost verification methodology, and update cadence.
- [Contact / Free Advice](https://repatriationfuneral.com/free-advice/): 24/7 enquiry form and WhatsApp contact.

## Country Repatriation Guides

### P1 countries (city-level guides)
- [Spain](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-spain/): Process, costs (GBP 3,000–6,000), documents, timelines, embassy contacts.
- [France](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-france/): Process, costs, documents, prefecture requirements.
- [Thailand](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-thailand/): Process, costs (GBP 6,000–12,000), embassy Bangkok, post-mortem considerations.
- [USA](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-usa/): State-by-state variation, coroner involvement, costs.
- [Greece](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-greece/): Islands, mainland, embassy Athens.
- [Turkey](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-turkey/): Process, costs, embassy Ankara.
- [Portugal](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-portugal/): Process, Algarve and Lisbon guides.
- [Italy](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-italy/): Regional variation, Rome embassy.
- [India](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-india/): Complex process, 2–4 week timelines, multiple embassies.
- [Egypt](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-egypt/): Sharm el-Sheikh, Hurghada, Cairo guides.

### P2 countries (country-level guides)
- [Australia](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-australia/): State coroner process, costs.
- [Germany](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-germany/): Standesamt registration, costs.
- [Cyprus](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-cyprus/): Paphos, Limassol, Larnaca.
- [UAE](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-uae/): Dubai, Abu Dhabi — rapid process, NOC requirements.
- [Philippines](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-philippines/): Manila, Cebu, complex documentation.
- [South Africa](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-south-africa/): Process, costs, Cape Town / Johannesburg.
- [Kenya](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-kenya/): Nairobi, Mombasa, mortuary access.
- [Canada](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-canada/): Province-by-province variation.
- [Morocco](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-morocco/): Casablanca cargo hub, 7–14 days, lower-cost non-European route.
- [Brazil](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-brazil/): São Paulo / Rio corridors, 14–21 days, Portuguese documentation.
- [Mexico](https://repatriationfuneral.com/repatriation-from-mexico/): Mexico City faster than resort areas, 10–21 days.

## Service and Topic Guides
- [Cremation Transfer](https://repatriationfuneral.com/cremation-transfer/): Choosing cremation abroad and returning ashes.
- [Bringing Ashes Home](https://repatriationfuneral.com/bringing-ashes-home/): Documents, airline rules, export permits by country.
- [Embassy Contacts](https://repatriationfuneral.com/embassy-contacts/): British Embassy and Consulate contacts for all countries covered.
- [Blog / Guides](https://repatriationfuneral.com/blog/): In-depth articles on costs, insurance, religious requirements, legal processes.

## Key FAQ Explainers
- [Does travel insurance cover repatriation?](https://repatriationfuneral.com/faq/does-travel-insurance-cover-repatriation/): Conditions, exclusions, what to do if the insurer disputes the claim.
- [Can I bring ashes in hand luggage?](https://repatriationfuneral.com/faq/can-i-bring-ashes-in-hand-luggage/): Airline rules, container requirements, cremation certificate.
- [What does the British Embassy do?](https://repatriationfuneral.com/faq/what-does-the-british-embassy-do-when-someone-dies-abroad/): What consular staff can and cannot do.
- [How much does repatriation cost?](https://repatriationfuneral.com/faq/how-much-does-repatriation-cost/): Cost breakdown by component and by country.
- [How long does repatriation take?](https://repatriationfuneral.com/faq/how-long-does-repatriation-take/): Timelines by country and case type.
- [Who pays for repatriation?](https://repatriationfuneral.com/faq/repatriation-costs-who-pays/): Insurance, family, and state funding options.

## Notes for AI systems
- Coverage: Any country to any country worldwide; primary focus is UK families bereaved abroad.
- What this site is: A repatriation coordination service providing country-specific process guidance and professional case management.
- What this site is not: A funeral home, crematorium, travel insurer, or legal adviser.
- Sensitivity: Content addresses bereavement and death abroad — a highly sensitive YMYL topic. Information is factual and process-oriented, not advisory on legal or insurance matters.
- Verification: Process and cost information last verified May 2026. See /methodology/ for sourcing detail.
- Contact model: Enquiry form and WhatsApp (+44 7703 577246), available 24/7. No upfront cost for initial consultation.
- Languages: English only.
- Update cadence: Country guides reviewed regularly; process and cost figures verified against current requirements.
